handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260406 12:00:00 CET"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU9000001"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":1}
client req_wsh_meta_data {"req_id":"$req1"}
server api_error {"req_id":"$req1","code":10276,"message":"News is not allowed.","advanced_order_reject_json":"","error_time_ms":""}
disconnect
